name: copySheetTo
description: Copies a sheet (tab) from one spreadsheet to another spreadsheet. Use getSpreadsheetInfo to find the numeric sheet ID. The copied sheet will be appended to the destination spreadsheet.

sourceSpreadsheetId.description: The spreadsheet ID of the source file.

sheetId.description: The numeric sheet ID to copy. Use getSpreadsheetInfo to find sheet IDs.

destinationSpreadsheetId.description: The spreadsheet ID of the destination file.
